# ViaSurg | Global Medical Standards Verification

> Clinical Minimalism Applied.

## Description
ViaSurg is a "Global Medical Standard Traffic Arbitrage Machine" that leverages established industry standards (Ethicon, Medtronic, etc.) to provide clinical-grade components with verified batch consistency and direct cross-reference to global standards.

## Products
- [[Trocars]]: Disposable laparoscopic access verified for absolute air-tightness and minimal insertion force.
- [[Hemoclips]]: High-margin endoscopic and laparoscopic ligation solutions.
- [[Biopsy Forceps]]: Standardized endoscopic consumables with verified batch consistency.
- [[Staplers]]: Surgical stapling systems with SKU-specific 1:1 cross-reference.

## Strategic Framework
- **The Glass Factory Principle**: Extreme transparency in manufacturing and clinical evidence.
- **NomoFlow™ Backend**: Algorithmic manufacturing control with batch-to-batch CV < 5.0%.
- **OBL Execution**: Rapid market entry via partner factory 510(k) and CE certificates.

- Index: /index.html
- Trocars: /pages/trocars.html
- Hemoclips: /pages/hemoclips.html
- Biopsy Forceps: /pages/biopsy-forceps.html
- Staplers: /pages/staplers.html
